claim_boundary: Phase 4 registration only. This does not claim production monitoring, content validation, alert readiness, autonomous action, or truth resolution.
phase4_goal: For all Phase 3 parsed samples, verify normalized fields, source provenance, language separation, uncertainty labels, category routing, and claim-safety notes.
purpose: Move from bounded live-sample records to claim-safety labeling, normalized schema checks, and source-category routing without validating truth or enabling alerts.
required_gates: Gate 1: load Phase 3 parsed sample records only
Gate 2: verify every parsed record has source_url, retrieved_at, source_type, category, uncertainty_label, and claim_boundary
Gate 3: preserve original-language fields separately from translated fields
Gate 5: flag high-risk source categories without resolving truth
Gate 7: do not create alerts, predictions, truth claims, or production monitoring claims
